case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MOISES E RAYMUNDO DEL CID

docket_entries.description: COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,171.48 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT DEL CID, MOISES E RAYMUNDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DEL CID, MOISES E RAYMUNDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEL CID, MOISES E RAYMUNDO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEL CID, MOISES E RAYMUNDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
